Text.Page: You'll make this for me? Or for her? Either way, that's terrific! I've other things to attend to.

Thank you! This looks exactly like the stuff she wanted. You should deliver it to her yourself.

I'm going to call on you if I need to use your skills again. Count on it.
You've got the design and kits. Talk to the crafting vendors if you need additional materials.
People like you make people like me happy to know...people like you. Thanks for all the help.
